videos.title: Simple Minds - Don't You (Forget About Me)
videos.description:
The official 4K video remaster of ‘Don’t You (Forget About Me)', the smash hit single by Simple Minds. 

Originally released in 1985, the track became an iconic anthem of the 1980s, famously featured in the closing scene of John Hughes’ film The Breakfast Club. The song topped the Billboard Hot 100 and remains one of the band's most enduring hits.

Remastered from the available 35mm film negatives and the 1985 videotape master by James Wong (insta: @jmhwong).

Listen to the 40th Ruby Anniversary edition of 'Once Upon A Time' here: https://simpleminds.ffm.to/onceuponatime

Simple Minds are one of the UK’s most enduring and influential rock bands, renowned for their anthemic sound and dynamic live performances. Formed in Glasgow in 1977 by Jim Kerr and Charlie Burchill, they rose from post-punk roots to global fame with hits like Don’t You (Forget About Me), Alive And Kicking and Belfast Child. With over 60 million records sold and chart-topping albums such as Sparkle In The Rain, Once Upon A Time, and Street Fighting Years, their legacy spans over four decades.
